overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient robes walking through an Egyptian city at night. The scene features classical stone architecture with columns, cobblestone streets, torch lighting, and scattered NPCs. The character progresses from a temple approach through a plaza with an obelisk, past market stalls, and toward a grand building with statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city street approaching classical temple

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward a large temple structure with columns

entered.detail: large stone building with white columns and triangular pediment at the end of the street
uneven stone pavement forming the walking surface
row of classical structures with stone pillars lining the right side
metal fire bowls providing warm orange illumination

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a cobblestone street at night toward a grand classical temple. The street is lined with stone buildings featuring columns on the right, while burning braziers provide warm light on the left. The sky is dark blue and clear above.

events.description: moving from enclosed street into open plaza area with tall obelisk monument becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the temple into a more open plaza area with monuments

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk rising in the distance beyond the plaza
wider open space with fewer buildings and more sky visible
tall palm trees visible in the distance against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character passes the temple and enters a more open plaza. A tall obelisk monument becomes visible in the distance, and palm trees line the left side. The space opens up with more sky visible above.

events.description: horse with rider trots past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the avenue as a horse rider passes by on the left side

notable_agents.action: horse with rider trotting past the character on the left side of the street

entered.detail: decorative stone pedestal at the base of the obelisk area

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside the obelisk monument which is now on the left. A horse and rider pass by on the left side of the street. Palm trees are more prominent, and the avenue remains wide and open.

events.description: entering commercial district with market stalls and increased pedestrian activity

agents.ego_description: walking through the market area browsing the stalls visible on the left side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark robes walking along the right side of the street

entered.detail: wooden market stalls covered with red and brown fabric canopies
wooden carts and wagons parked near the market area

segments.scene_description: The character enters a commercial area with market stalls featuring red canopies on the left. More pedestrians are visible walking along the street. The architecture remains classical with stone columns on the right side.

events.description: approaching large building with illuminated statues becoming prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: walking toward a grand building with large illuminated statues flanking the entrance

entered.detail: large stone building with grand entrance and architectural details
tall statues lit by warm light on pedestals flanking the building entrance
single tall stone column visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand building on the right featuring large illuminated statues. The market stalls are now behind, and the street continues toward a tall pillar monument in the distance. The architecture becomes more monumental and imposing.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a nocturnal Egyptian city that evolves from a narrow temple approach into a grand, monumental district. It begins on a cobblestone street lined with stone columns and burning braziers, moving steadily toward a classical temple under a clear dark blue sky. As the character passes the temple, the environment opens into a wide plaza where palm trees appear and a tall obelisk emerges in the distance. The scene then shifts alongside the obelisk as a horse and rider pass by, before transitioning into a bustling commercial area filled with red-canopied market stalls and pedestrians. Finally, the camera moves past the markets toward an imposing building featuring large illuminated statues and a distant pillar monument.
